DOCKLANDS LIGHT RAILWAY: Sunday 12 July, no service between Shadwell and Tower Gateway.

Elizabeth line: All day on Sunday, 12 July, service will operate at a reduced frequency between Whitechapel and Shenfield while we undertake repairs following a line side fire at Stratford on Friday. Normal service will operate on the of the line.

Severe delays between Paddington and Heathrow Terminals / Reading while we fix a track fault between Acton Main Line and Paddington. Tickets are being accepted by Great Western Railway and London Underground. METROPOLITAN LINE: Saturday 11 and Sunday 12 July, no service between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Uxbridge. There will also be no PICCADILLY LINE service between Hammersmith and Uxbridge. Replacement bus service ML1 operates between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Uxbridge via West Harrow (Treve Avenue), Rayners Lane, Eastcote, Ruislip Manor, Ruislip, West Ruislip (for Central line and Chiltern Railways), Icken

PICCADILLY LINE: Saturday 11, from 0045, and all day Sunday 12 July, no service between Hammersmith and Heathrow (all terminals) / Uxbridge. The METROPOLITAN LINE will also be suspended between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Uxbridge. Use HEATHROW EXPRESS and ELIZABETH LINE for transfers between Heathrow terminals. Replacement bus services operate.
Waterloo & City line: service operates 06:00 until 00:30, Monday to Friday only. There is no service on Saturdays, Sundays and on bank/public holidays.
